message:
🌱 Add langflow: Error in DB migration with PostgreSQL mission (#863)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "langflow-1432-error-in-db-migration-with-postgresql-for-langflow-v0-6",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "langflow: Error in DB migration with PostgreSQL for Langflow v0.6",
+    "description": "Error in DB migration with PostgreSQL for Langflow v0.6. Community-reported issue.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify langflow troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your langflow installation:\n```bash\npip show langflow | grep Version\n```\nLook for errors during DB migration when using PostgreSQL. The log may suggest running `langflow migration --fix`, but executing this command does not resolve the error."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review langflow configuration",
+        "description": "When using PostgreSQL as the database for Langflow version 0.6, an error occurs during the DB migration process. The alembic migration scripts had a missing import for the logger module and incorrect error handling during the upgrade process."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for DB migration with PostgreSQL",
+        "description": "The fix adds the missing logger import in `script.py.mako` and corrects the error handling in the alembic upgrade scripts. Ensure your Docker Compose sets up PostgreSQL correctly:\n```yaml\nservices:\n  langflow:\n    build: .\n    env_file:\n      - .env\n    ports:\n      - \"7860:7860\"\n    depends_on:\n      db:\n        condition: service_healthy\n\n  db:\n    image: postgres:15\n    ports:\n      - \"5432:5432\"\n    environment:\n      POSTGRES_DB: langflow\n      POSTGRES_USER: user\n      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: password\n    volumes:\n      - ./src/db/data:/var/lib/postgresql/data\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD-SHELL\", \"pg_isready -U user -d postgres\"]\n      timeout: 20s\n      interval: 10s\n      retries: 5\n      start_period: 30s\n```\nUpgrade to a langflow version that includes this migration fix."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade langflow to include the fix",
+        "description": "Upgrade langflow to a version that includes the migration fix:\n```bash\npip install --upgrade langflow\npip show langflow | grep Version\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm the issue is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by restarting Langflow and confirming that the DB migration completes successfully with PostgreSQL. Check that no alembic migration errors appear in the logs."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Added the missing import for the logger module in script.py.mako and fixed the error handling during the upgrade process in the alembic migration scripts, resolving the PostgreSQL migration failure in Langflow v0.6.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "services:\n  langflow:\n    build: .\n    env_file:\n      - .env\n    ports:\n      - \"7860:7860\"\n    depends_on:\n      db:\n        condition: service_healthy\n\n  db:\n    image: postgres:15\n    ports:\n      - \"5432:5432\"\n    environment:\n      POSTGRES_DB: langflow\n      POSTGRES_USER: user\n      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: password\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD-SHELL\", \"pg_isready -U user -d postgres\"]\n      timeout: 20s\n      interval: 10s\n      retries: 5\n      start_period: 30s"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "langflow",
+      "community",
+      "ai-app",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "langflow"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/langflow-ai/langflow/issues/1432",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/langflow-ai/langflow",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/langflow-ai/langflow/pull/1650"
+    },
+    "reactions": 4,
+    "comments": 19,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "pip",
+      "python",
+      "docker"
+    ],
+    "description": "Python 3.10+ with langflow installed (pip install langflow). Docker and Docker Compose for containerized deployment with PostgreSQL."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:48:24.512Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
